programmes.show_description: Love beauty? Tune in to see our exciting array of popular and iconic brands plus cult products you're sure to love.
Tune in to see Dyson's ground-breaking Supersonic hairdryer and Airwrap styling tool. Discover how quick and quiet drying or styling your hair can be with these intelligent tools.
Live well every day with QVC. Discover inspiring products, expert tips and wellness essentials to help you feel your best, inside and out.
Speed up your beauty routine with The Big Silk and top beauty tools. Achieve an effortless glow up and discover essentials for radiant, time-saving self-care.
Love beauty? Tune in to see the latest deals and bag a beauty bargain. We've got an exciting array of popular and iconic brands plus cult products you're sure to adore.
Unlock haircare secrets with Scandinavian BioLabs. Join Alison Young for expert advice and discover innovative solutions for stronger, healthier-looking hair.
Ultrasun have the answer to your summer holidays with once-a-day suncare protection. Tune in to find out which product is best for you and your family all year round.
Bringing together the latest, ground-breaking technology with the highest grade concentration of unique active ingredients, discover long-lasting skincare with anti-ageing benefits from skinSense.
The Prime Fifty range features nutritional supplements tailored specifically to the needs of the over 50s and beyond, helping you to have the time of your life in the prime of your life.
Live well every day with QVC. Discover inspiring products, expert tips and wellness essentials to help you feel your best, inside and out.
Up your beauty game with our best finds in the industry, from favourite formulas to the latest releases. Whether you want to shake up your make-up or step up your skincare, find it here.
Discover your best skin with help from the experts at Elemis. With a huge range of targeted formulas that feel indulgent on the skin, this range will have everyday feeling like a trip to the spa.
Love beauty? Tune in to see the latest deals and bag a beauty bargain. We've got an exciting array of popular and iconic brands plus cult products you're sure to adore.
Liz Earle is an award-winning British beauty brand renowned for creating naturally active skincare and bodycare products, which help to deliver real results for all ages and skin types.
Professional beauty products from the pioneering skincare specialists. Gatineau combines the highest quality plant and marine extracts with the very latest cutting-edge biotechnology.

Prai is a ginger-like root that has been harvested in the tropical forests of Thailand for more than 1000 years. This range of prestige skincare combines traditional wisdom with the latest technology.
Awaken your senses with fragrance experts Molton Brown, London's bath, body and beauty connoisseurs since 1973. Indulge in exquisitely crafted blends brought to you by Molton Brown, London.

Laura Geller is a renowned make-up artist, teacher and working mother and the creative force behind one of the most successful make-up studios in New York. Join us to explore her superb range.
This show features a wide range of beauty products for your body, face, hair and nails, plus a selection of make-up. Plus our top beauty experts will be on hand to give you great advice and tips.

Find the best in health and fitness products to give you a spring in your step and a healthier lifestyle. From top tips and great gadgets, we'll help you to revitalise your daily routine.
